violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Ice dispenser door is broken and does not properly open or close. Inside of the door is cracked and broken.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Basement floor is bare concrete and is not a smooth easily cleanable surface. Floor needs to be painted or sealed.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop stored at the top of the stairs and not placed in a proper position to dry.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. 3 chemical spray bottles located by the dish pit were unlabeled.
Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied according to manufacturer's label. Bleach in the sanitizer bucket was reading >200ppm.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
